name: Fillout
description: Read Fillout (modern form/survey builder) form definitions and submissions from any AI agent. 6 tools, Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Fillout API v1 (fillout.com/help/developers).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://fillout.com → top-right avatar → **Settings → Developer → API → Create API key**.
2. Set `FILLOUT_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${FILLOUT_API_KEY}`.

**Form IDs**: each form has a 32-character ID (visible in form URL). Use `fillout_list_forms` to discover.

**Submission shape**: each submission has questions[] array of {id, name, type, value}. Cross-reference with form questions for human-readable names.

**Pagination**: `?limit=N&offset=M`. Submissions endpoint supports `?afterDate=ISO&beforeDate=ISO`.

**Out of scope here**: form creation (UI), file uploads, webhook subscription management.

tools.name: fillout_get_form
tools.description: Fetch a form's full definition: questions[] (id, name, type, options), settings.

tools.name: fillout_list_submissions
tools.description: List submissions for a form, with optional date range filter.

includeEditLink.description: If true, include the edit link for each submission.

sort.description: asc or desc by submitted time.

tools.name: fillout_get_submission
tools.description: Fetch one submission with full answers.

tools.name: fillout_delete_submissions
tools.description: Delete one or more submissions by ID.

tools.name: fillout_create_submission
tools.description: Programmatically create a submission. submissions array has {questions:[{id, value}], hiddenFields?, urlParameters?}.

submissions.description: Array of submissions: [{questions:[{id, value}], submissionTime?, hiddenFields?, urlParameters?}].
